units.title: Sounds & Pronunciation
units.description: Czech alphabet, háček, čárka, first-syllable stress, problem sounds: ř, ě

units.title: Greetings & Introductions
units.description: Dobrý den, na shledanou, děkuji, prosím. Jmenuju se..., Jsem z...

units.title: Gender & Nominative Case
units.description: Masculine, feminine, neuter nouns. To je... identification pattern. Profession pairs.

units.title: Present Tense — být & mít
units.description: Conjugation of být (to be) and mít (to have). Negation and question forms.

units.title: Present Tense — Regular Verbs
units.description: Three conjugation classes: -át, -ít, -et/-ět. Daily activities, speaking, understanding.

units.title: Accusative Case
units.description: Direct objects: feminine -a→-u, masculine animate -a/-e, inanimate/neuter unchanged.

units.title: Pronouns & Possessives
units.description: Personal pronouns (já, ty, on...) and possessive adjectives (můj, tvůj, náš...). Gender agreement.

units.title: Family & Basic Descriptions
units.description: Family vocabulary, adjective-noun gender agreement, describing people and things.

units.title: Numbers, Time & Dates
units.description: Čísla 0-100, Kolik je hodin?, days of the week, months, telling time. Dnes je...

units.title: Daily Routine & Reflexive Verbs
units.description: Reflexive se/si, morning/evening routines, vstávám, sprchuju se. Telling the daily schedule.

units.title: Food, Drink & Restaurants
units.description: Ordering jídlo a pití, Czech cuisine vocab, accusative with jíst/pít. V restauraci.

units.title: Shopping, Prices & Clothes
units.description: Kolik to stojí? Prices, sizes, colors. Clothes shopping, accusative with chtít/kupovat.

units.title: Hobbies & Free Time
units.description: Mít rád, rád + verb. Co rád děláš? Sports, music, reading. Adverbs of frequency.

units.title: Directions, Places & Transport
units.description: Kde je...? Directions, places in town, transport. Locative intro: v Praze, na náměstí.

units.title: Weather, Seasons & Travel
units.description: Počasí, roční období, travel basics. Bude pršet. Past tense intro: byl jsem v...

units.title: A1 Exam Preparation
units.description: Practice with A1-level exam-format exercises: reading comprehension, listening comprehension, writing tasks (form filling, short messages), and speaking practice (Q&A, picture description). Modeled on the official Czech permanent residence A1 exam.

units.title: A1 Review & Consolidation
units.description: Review and consolidate all A1 grammar and vocabulary: nominative and accusative cases, present tense, gender agreement, pronouns, basic sentence structure, and everyday survival expressions.
